description: Update this screen to be a full screen app as descibed in plans/terminal-ui.md
root_cause: Feature request: client was showing its own connect/diagnostics screen instead of a server-driven full-screen UI. Phase H of the terminal-ui plan implemented displaySurfaceMode (TERMINALS_DISPLAY_SURFACE env var) which hides the connection chrome and shows the server-provided idle placeholder until the first SetUI arrives, then transitions to the server-driven descriptor.
notes: Platform macOS:web. Client had received terminal_root SetUI updates at time of filing but was still showing the connection screen because displaySurfaceMode=false (default). The display-surface mode is intended for dedicated kiosk/display devices.
